column3:
Guide:
1.Input your starting amount of Gleaming Shards, then add your current 
auction house prices to all other fields with a star (*).
2.Now you can see your total expected profit after AH fee. You can also see 
your crafted price per storm dust and use it to override in CraftSim or in other 
sheet calculations.
(Find the optimal setup below).
